creator: wolfgang.meyer@hob.de
text:
When trying to update gnome-control-center to version 3.16.3 with option CUPS unset, installation fails with error message:

pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/sysutils/gnome-control-center/work/stage/usr/local/share/applications/gnome-printer-panel.desktop: No such file or directory
*** [fake-pkg] Error code 74


Setting the option CUPS installs the port just fine.
